task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the correct titles and at least one decorative shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the first page of the flipchart. Verify there is text reading 'Color Theory' (title) and 'Elements of Art' (subtitle), along with at least one drawn shape.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains a color wheel diagram with at least 6 distinct shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the second page. Verify there are at least 6 distinct shapes arranged in a diagram or wheel pattern on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Page 2 shapes are filled with the correct primary and secondary colors and are labeled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the second page, verify the shapes are filled with Red, Yellow, Blue, Orange, Green, and Violet (or Purple). Each shape must have a corresponding text label identifying its color.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the title and the list of the seven elements of art.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the third page. Verify the title 'Elements of Art' is present, along with a text list containing exactly these seven words: Line, Shape, Form, Space, Color, Value, and Texture.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and the filename 'color_wheel_art.flipchart', or check the ActivInspire application title bar for the filename 'color_wheel_art.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire application GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the ActivInspire application window, toolbars, and canvas are visible in the screenshots, rather than a script or text editor.

integrity.description: The color wheel consists of genuine shapes and text objects created in the app, not a pasted image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of shape tools, fill bucket usage, or text box creation in the toolbars/history, ensuring the color wheel isn't just a single image copied from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box being interacted with, rather than terminal commands being used to move or rename files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must have exactly 3 pages. Expected save path: /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/color_wheel_art.flipchart. Page 2 must have at least 6 shapes. Primary colors required: Red, Yellow, Blue. Secondary colors required: Orange, Green, and either Violet OR Purple (treat Violet and Purple as interchangeable; only one is needed). Page 3 must list exactly these 7 elements: Line, Shape, Form, Space, Color, Value, Texture.
